channel.title: Bill Nygren — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED NFLX (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added NFLX in Q4 2025 · 4.0% of portfolio. Adding to Netflix on profitability.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED KKR (+20%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added KKR in Q4 2025 · 2.7% of portfolio. Building the new KKR position.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED NFLX (+10%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added NFLX in Q3 2025 · 3.6% of portfolio. Netflix profitability story.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED C (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added C in Q3 2025 · 4.0% of portfolio. More Citigroup on turnaround.

item.title: Bill Nygren: NEW POSITION KKR · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) new position KKR in Q3 2025 · 2.2% of portfolio. New KKR position — alts.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED NFLX (+8%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added NFLX in Q2 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio. Building Netflix.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED C (+10%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added C in Q2 2025 · 3.7% of portfolio. Building Citigroup.
